title: Portable AI Swarm Simulation Workbench
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: Executable packet Buildprint for a source-independent AI swarm simulation workbench: upload seed material, generate ontology, build graph context, prepare and run simulations, generate reports, chat with agents, and manage history through proof-gated phase files.
plainDescription: A fresh Mapper OS selected packet remapped from MiroFish source evidence and scoped as the full portable AI swarm simulation workbench. It preserves broad product scope while keeping qualification honest until live provider, runtime, browser, persistence, and security proof passes.
promise: Build a portable AI swarm simulation workbench without depending on the original source repo. Status remains PROOF_REQUIRED until all proof gates pass.
whatYouGet: Executable Buildprint BUILDPRINT start and machine contract
Six consolidated phase files with source evidence, implementation paths, team gates, and proof gates
Team stack, UX contract, design quality bar, safety boundaries, and evaluation matrix
Evidence ledger seed and unresolved blocker list
whatYouNeed: LLM provider credentials for live ontology/report/profile proof
Zep-compatible graph-memory credentials for live graph proof
OASIS/CAMEL-compatible runtime or approved simulation worker
Persistence backend decision and browser test environment
risks: Counting deterministic adapters as live provider proof
Static graph/report data presented as real behavior
Secret leakage through logs, reports, screenshots, or ledger entries
checks: YAML/JSON/JSONL parse validation expected before publication
Qualification remains PROOF_REQUIRED until proof gates pass

trustBadges.label: Source-independent
trustBadges.detail: Implementation agents should not need the original source checkout.

copyPrompt: Use this Mapper OS executable Buildprint. Start from BUILDPRINT.md, then follow 01-questions.md, 02-project-setup.md, blueprint.yaml, 03-phases/phase-index.yaml, the active phase file, 04-evaluation.md, and 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl. Complete project setup before phase implementation. Create project root/local AGENTS.md only in the implementation project from 02-project-setup.md, never inside the blueprint packet. Execute one active phase at a time with observe, plan, execute, verify, reflect, and record. On verification failure, route repair back to the current phase unless setup, questions, a prior phase, or an external blocker is responsible. Keep claims proof-required until proof rows pass.

publicStatus.label: Mapped, proof pending
publicStatus.explanation: Source-independent packet exists; live implementation proof is not complete.
